title: Original Arrow Recipe
description: On 28 January 2010 the arrow recipe was 1 arrow for 1 apple.
body:
# Original Arrow Recipe

This is just a simple recipe data pack, nothing special.

0.24_SURVIVAL_TEST; Arrows have been added as an object and are fired by pressing Tab. 20100128; Arrows can now be crafted using apples.

1 apple will get you **1 arrow**. 

**Side Note**: The game will most likely tell you that the data pack is out of data depending on the version you are choosing to play but it works just fine 1.13-1.20

![recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4f9b04545e00b8bdd490f2c0b2da21bb168d7823.png)
